title: Guess the Number

tests.name: welcome banner and easy difficulty
tests.expected_stdout:
Welcome to Guess the Number!
Enter a seed: Choose difficulty (1=easy, 2=medium, 3=hard): Difficulty easy: guess a number between 1 and 50.
Your guess: Correct! You got it in 1 attempts.
Play again? (y/n):
Final stats
Games played: 1
Best round: 1 attempts
Average attempts: 1.00
Thanks for playing!
